basics.name: Sergii Kucherenko
basics.label: full-stack developer
basics.summary: 21-year-old motivated trainee/junior full-stack developer with a Bachelor’s degree in Software Engineering. Strong foundation in programming concepts, OOP, SOLID and modern software design principles. Hands-on experience building applications with ASP.NET Core using layered, clean architecture, covering authentication, ORM, multiple SQL/NoSQL databases, caching, concurrency handling, and Docker-based containerization. Most confident in C# and JavaScript/TypeScript, with additional experience in Python for basic data analysis and web scraping. Quick learner, eager to grow as a professional software developer, passionate about creating scalable and maintainable systems, exploring how technologies work under the hood, and applying best practices to optimize real-world applications.

education.institution: National Technical University of Ukraine "Igor Sikorsky Kyiv Polytechnic Institute"
education.area: Software Engineering, Faculty of Applied Mathematics

projects.name: MeetPoint
projects.summary: Web application that simplifies meetup organizing by calculating optimal locations for multiple users based on routes, travel times, and real-time position updates.

projects.name: Obsidian codebase
projects.summary: Personal codebase powering my Obsidian vault with custom scripts, utilities, and integrations.

projects.name: Rewriter
projects.summary: Long-running Windows background service for automatic file conversion to PDF.

projects.name: Python snippets
projects.summary: A collection of small Python scripts and tasks for data analysis
